# Try downloading the symbol/debug file from Microsoft symbol server
# Try several URL patterns
BUILDID="1eb39fc72918c7c6c0c610b79eb3d3d47b2f81be"
OUTDIR="/tmp/symbols"
mkdir -p "$OUTDIR"

# Pattern 1: ELF debug info
curl -sSL -o "$OUTDIR/libmonosgen-2.0.so.dbg" \
  "https://msdl.microsoft.com/download/symbols/_.debug/elf-buildid-sym-${BUILDID}/_.debug" \
  -w "\nHTTP %{http_code} for pattern 1\n" 2>&1

# Pattern 2: The .so itself with symbols
curl -sSL -o "$OUTDIR/libmonosgen-2.0.so" \
  "https://msdl.microsoft.com/download/symbols/libmonosgen-2.0.so/elf-buildid-${BUILDID}/libmonosgen-2.0.so" \
